premium_products.name: Executive Leather Recliner Chairs
premium_products.short_description: Premium Italian leather recliner with massage function
premium_products.detailed_description: Executive-grade recliner chairs crafted from premium Italian leather with built-in massage function, heating elements, and USB charging ports. Perfect for luxury offices and homes.

premium_products.name: Luxury Sectional Sofas
premium_products.short_description: Handcrafted sectional sofas with premium upholstery
premium_products.detailed_description: Handcrafted luxury sectional sofas with premium fabric upholstery, modular design, and customizable configurations. Made with hardwood frame and high-density foam cushioning.

premium_products.name: Designer Coffee Tables
premium_products.short_description: Contemporary glass and metal coffee tables
premium_products.detailed_description: Contemporary designer coffee tables featuring tempered glass tops with artistic metal bases. Available in multiple finishes including gold, silver, and bronze accents.

premium_products.name: King Size Memory Foam Mattresses
premium_products.short_description: Orthopedic memory foam with cooling technology
premium_products.detailed_description: Premium king-size memory foam mattresses with advanced cooling gel technology, orthopedic support, and hypoallergenic materials. 10-year warranty included.

premium_products.name: Smart Adjustable Bed Frames
premium_products.short_description: Motorized adjustable beds with app control
premium_products.detailed_description: High-tech adjustable bed frames with smartphone app control, massage functions, USB ports, and under-bed lighting. Compatible with all mattress types.

premium_products.name: Premium Dining Sets
premium_products.short_description: Solid wood dining sets with designer chairs
premium_products.detailed_description: Luxury dining sets crafted from solid teak wood with contemporary designer chairs. Available in 6-seater and 8-seater configurations with matching sideboards.

premium_products.name: Executive Office Chairs
premium_products.short_description: Ergonomic office chairs with lumbar support
premium_products.detailed_description: Premium ergonomic executive chairs with advanced lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and breathable mesh backing. Designed for 8+ hour comfort.

premium_products.name: Luxury Wardrobes
premium_products.short_description: Custom-designed sliding door wardrobes
premium_products.detailed_description: Custom luxury wardrobes with sliding mirror doors, LED lighting, and modular interior organization systems. Made from premium engineered wood with lifetime warranty.

premium_products.name: Premium Recliners
premium_products.short_description: Power recliners with massage and heating
premium_products.detailed_description: Premium power recliners with built-in massage functions, heating elements, and cup holders. Available in genuine leather and fabric options.

premium_products.name: Designer Bookshelves
premium_products.short_description: Modular wall-mounted bookshelf systems
premium_products.detailed_description: Contemporary modular bookshelf systems with adjustable shelving and integrated LED lighting. Perfect for modern homes and offices.

premium_products.name: Professional Espresso Machines
premium_products.short_description: Commercial-grade espresso machines for home
premium_products.detailed_description: Professional espresso machines with dual boiler system, PID temperature control, and commercial-grade components. Perfect for coffee enthusiasts and small cafes.

premium_products.name: Luxury Wine Coolers
premium_products.short_description: Temperature-controlled wine storage systems
premium_products.detailed_description: Luxury wine coolers with dual-zone temperature control, UV-resistant glass doors, and capacity for 50-200 bottles. Ideal for wine collectors and restaurants.

premium_products.name: High-End Stand Mixers
premium_products.short_description: Professional stand mixers with multiple attachments
premium_products.detailed_description: Heavy-duty stand mixers with powerful motors and comprehensive attachment sets including pasta makers, meat grinders, and ice cream makers.

premium_products.name: Premium Chef Knife Sets
premium_products.short_description: Japanese steel chef knives with wooden blocks
premium_products.detailed_description: Professional chef knife sets made from high-carbon Japanese steel with ergonomic handles and premium wooden storage blocks. Includes sharpening steel.

premium_products.name: Built-in Ovens
premium_products.short_description: Convection ovens with steam cooking capabilities
premium_products.detailed_description: Premium built-in ovens with convection, steam cooking, and pyrolytic self-cleaning functions. Multiple cooking programs and smartphone connectivity.

premium_products.name: Kitchen Islands
premium_products.short_description: Custom kitchen islands with granite tops
premium_products.detailed_description: Custom-designed kitchen islands with premium granite countertops, built-in storage, and electrical outlets. Available in multiple sizes and configurations.

premium_products.name: Commercial Dishwashers
premium_products.short_description: High-capacity dishwashers for large households
premium_products.detailed_description: Commercial-grade dishwashers suitable for large households and small restaurants. Energy-efficient with multiple wash cycles and sanitization options.

premium_products.name: Induction Cooktops
premium_products.short_description: Touch-control induction cooktops with safety features
premium_products.detailed_description: Premium induction cooktops with touch controls, multiple power levels, and advanced safety features including child lock and overheat protection.

premium_products.name: Range Hoods
premium_products.short_description: Stainless steel range hoods with LED lighting
premium_products.detailed_description: High-performance range hoods with powerful extraction, LED lighting, and touch controls. Available in island and wall-mounted configurations.

premium_products.name: Water Purification Systems
premium_products.short_description: Whole-house water purification with UV sterilization
premium_products.detailed_description: Complete water purification systems with multi-stage filtration, UV sterilization, and mineral retention. Suitable for entire households.
